mapper.insert: insert into phone_model (brand, model_name, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{brand}, #{modelName}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update phone_model
brand = #{brand},
model_name = #{modelName},
sort = #{sort},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from phone_model where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select id, brand, model_name, sort, status, update_time from phone_model
and brand like concat('%', #{brand}, '%')
and model_name like concat('%', #{modelName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by sort asc, update_time desc

select * from phone_model where id in
#{id}
